name: Bacalhau'a Bras
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the codfish in cold water overnight or for as long as possible.
2. Remove bones and any loose skin from the cod.
3. Peel the potatoes and cut them into long, thick matchsticks.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic cloves and fry until golden brown. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon and discard.
5. Drain the soaked cod and flake it into small pieces using your hands or fork.
6. In the same skillet, add potato sticks that have been lightly fried separately. Cook for a few minutes.
7. Stir in the flaked cod and cook until just set, about 2-3 minutes total.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. In a bowl, beat eggs with a pinch of salt and pepper.
10. Gently pour the beaten eggs over the cod and potato mixture, allowing it to lightly scramble without stirring.
11. Sprinkle chopped parsley on top.
12. Garnish with black olives and serve on lettuce leaves alongside tomato slices.
